name: Hermes
description: Hermes agent runtime harness, Hermes model catalog, and Docker ACP tools.

hermesCommand.description: Command to invoke Hermes ACP. Default: docker exec hermes-agent bash -c 'source /opt/hermes/.venv/bin/activate && hermes acp'.

hermesContainerName.description: Docker container name for Hermes. Default: hermes-agent.

runtimeCwd.description: Execution working directory inside Hermes ACP. Default: /tmp.

transport.description: Transport mode: tcp connects to the persistent ACP bridge, stdio uses docker exec per task. Default: tcp.

tcpHost.description: TCP host for Hermes ACP bridge. Default: 127.0.0.1.

tcpPort.description: TCP port for Hermes ACP bridge. Default: 3100.

defaultModel.description: Default LLM model for Hermes tasks.

defaultContextLevel.description: Default context level for task dispatch.

defaultCredentialScope.description: Default credential scope for task dispatch.

defaultWriteback.description: Default writeback strategy for task dispatch.

timeout.description: Default timeout in seconds for Hermes tasks. Default: 1800.

autoStrategy.description: Enable automatic L/C/W strategy inference. Default: true.

enableLayeredProtocol.description: Enable the layered dispatch protocol (L/C/W). Default: true.

acp.description: Optional nested compatibility config for Hermes ACP.

runtime.description: Deprecated compatibility namespace from an earlier Hermes harness prototype.

hermesCommand.label: Hermes Command
hermesCommand.help: Override the command used to start Hermes ACP. Leave empty to use docker exec.

hermesContainerName.label: Container Name
hermesContainerName.help: Docker container name where Hermes Agent runs.

transport.label: Transport
transport.help: Use tcp for the persistent ACP bridge or stdio for docker exec per task.

runtimeCwd.label: Runtime CWD
runtimeCwd.help: Hermes execution working directory. Keep this away from the OpenClaw workspace to avoid accidental edits to USER.md and similar files.

defaultModel.label: Default Model
defaultModel.help: LLM model Hermes uses for tasks.

enableLayeredProtocol.label: Layered Protocol
enableLayeredProtocol.help: When disabled, tasks are sent directly without L/C/W context, credential, or writeback processing.
